name: precedence-dispatched-then-returned
description: YB-10 rehome (plan task 3.1) of Detector.Tests.ps1's 'precedence resolves a subject with dispatched + returned to returned' case (S3.1): a dispatched record and a later returned record for the same subject resolve to state=returned with the dispatched exposed in superseded. Provenance: OBSERVED - expected block generated by running scripts/Detect-Dispatches.ps1 at repo commit 896e10e on this exact input (2026-07-23), then reviewed for correctness against the pre-existing imperative assertion this vector replaces.
